pages.text: Adjacent Magic Storage blocks share a connected outer casing. Their center symbols stay separate, so the Core, Units, Terminals, and the inward or outward Bus faces remain easy to recognize.

Connected casing is an optional visual enhancement from $(thing)Fusion 1.2.12 for Minecraft 1.21.1$(). Without it, every Magic Storage block still works with its ordinary casing. When Fusion is installed, the connected edges enable automatically.

Inventory icons remain ordinary single-block views. Casing lines only show physical adjacency; they do not indicate available capacity, a loaded Core, or whether a network is conflicted. Use the terminal and troubleshooting pages for those checks.
